2.label: Lowly Beggar
2.description: You spent your early years on the streets.

3.label: Canny Beggar
3.description: You learned which streets were safe and which marks were generous.

4.label: Experienced Beggar
4.description: You became a fixture of the city.

5.label: Beggar Monarch
5.description: The beggars look to you for leadership and wisdom.

2.label: Petty Thief
2.description: You stole to survive, then stole for the thrill.

4.label: Burglar
4.description: No lock can keep you out.
4.special: Change one Stealth die and one Climb die to an Expert Die.

5.label: Criminal Mastermind
5.special: Change your ED in Stealth to an MD.

2.label: Street Entertainer
2.description: You busked for coppers in the mud.

3.label: Traveling Bard
3.description: You brought news and song to isolated villages.

4.label: Successful Player
4.description: You performed for the wealthy and the powerful.
4.special: Change one Perform die and one Fascinate die to an Expert Die.

5.label: Renowned Performer
5.description: Your name is known across the continent.
5.special: Change one of your EDs (your choice) into an MD.

2.label: Miserly Merchant
2.description: You learned early to hoard your coin.

3.label: Canny Tradesman
3.description: You expanded your routes and learned the tricks of the trade.

4.label: Banker
4.description: You let your money do the working for you.
4.special: Change one normal Haggle die to an Expert Die.

5.label: Captain of Industry
5.special: Change your Haggle ED to an MD.

2.label: Able Seaman
2.description: You know the rigging and how to take a beating from the sea.

3.label: Weathered Tar
3.description: You've survived storms that sank lesser vessels.

4.label: First Mate
4.description: You keep the crew in line and the ship on course.

2.label: Foot Soldier
2.description: You were handed a weapon and told to hold the line.

3.label: Veteran Warrior
3.special: Change one Fight or Weapon die to an Expert Die.

4.label: Front Line Fighter
4.description: You are the first into the breach.

5.label: Champion
5.description: Lords bid for your services in single combat.
5.special: Change your ED into an MD.

2.label: Lowly Sage
2.description: You spent your youth copying scrolls and translating texts.

3.label: Canny Sage
3.description: You learned how to find the hidden truths.

5.label: Master Sage
5.description: You have uncovered secrets that could change the world.

2.label: Squad Leader
2.description: You kept a few soldiers alive.

3.label: Officer
3.description: You commanded a company in the field.

4.label: Commander
4.description: You dictate the flow of the battle.

5.label: General
5.description: Entire armies march on your word.
5.special: Change one Strategy die to an Expert Die.

2.label: Sorcerer's Apprentice
2.description: You were taught the dangerous arts of the unseen.

4.label: Adept
4.description: Your mastery over the arcane grew.
4.special: Change one Sorcery die to an Expert Die.

5.label: Master Enchanter
5.description: You manipulate reality with a thought.
5.special: Change your Sorcery ED to an MD.

2.label: Noble Byblow
2.description: Born on the fringes of power, you learned etiquette and superiority.

3.label: Minor Noble
3.description: You hold a small title and navigate the courts.

4.label: Prominent Noble
4.description: Your family has the ear of the sovereign.
4.special: Change one Intimidate die to an Expert Die.

5.label: Of Royal Blood
5.description: You are in the line of succession.
5.special: Change your Intimidate ED into an MD.

1.label: Exiled
1.description: You are no longer welcome in some province, country, or region.

2.label: Robbed!
2.description: Someone has stolen pretty much every cent you have in the world.
2.special: If you have Wealth, you may trade it for another Advantage.

3.label: Someone Got Spurned
3.description: You rejected or got rejected, and someone's heart got crushed.

4.label: Racer
4.description: You spent time jockeying an animal on a track.
4.special: Change your Ride die to an Expert Die.

6.label: Gladiator
6.description: You've fought for the entertainment of others.

7.label: Rescued an Injured Animal
7.description: You saved a critter and nursed it back to health.

8.label: Kidnapped by Barbarians
8.description: You spent time as a captive of another culture.

9.label: Mystic/Religious Experience
9.description: You experienced something that fundamentally changed your worldview.

10.label: Served the Decadent Rich
10.description: You got to see society's best at their worst.

1.label: Mistaken Identity
1.description: Embroiled in zany misadventures when mistaken for someone else.

2.label: Imprisoned
2.description: You were jailed somewhere crowded and unpleasant.

3.label: Love Triangle
3.description: Hurt feelings, regrets, and an embarrassing public scene.

4.label: Caravan Debacle
4.description: Your caravan never went to its intended destination.

5.label: Press Ganged
5.description: Forced into service aboard a warship.

6.label: Vengeance Quest
6.description: They murdered your family. Now they must pay!

7.label: Magnificent Garden
7.description: You had a really great garden. Now it's gone.

8.label: Stolen Birthright
8.description: You've been tricked out of what's yours by right.

10.label: Diplomatic Incident
10.description: You created tremendous antagonism between two states.

1.label: Raised Wild
1.description: Abandoned in the woods and nursed by wolves.
1.special: Lose the normal Master Die for your Native Language.

2.label: Death Defier
2.description: You fought free against incredible odds.

3.label: Star Crossed Lovers
3.description: Events conspired to trap you away from your beloved.

4.label: Unexpected Windfall
4.description: You've come to own something of great value.

5.label: Stranded
5.description: You had to survive solo for a really long time.

6.label: Saved Someone's Life
6.description: You've got a friend for life.

7.label: Unlikely Education
7.description: You gained knowledge completely unrelated to your professions.

8.label: Disastrous Mountain Expedition
8.description: You were exploring uncharted lands and it all went awry.

9.label: Strange Birthmark
9.description: A few people who've seen it have had very strange reactions.

10.label: Majesty's Personal Cobbler
10.description: You made the most beautiful shoes in the kingdom.
